## Summary
- What changed and why?

## Risk Level
- [ ] Low (safe refactor/docs/tests)
- [ ] Medium (behavior change with bounded impact)
- [ ] High (auth, migrations, data deletion, production workflow)

## Required Checks
- [ ] `npm run verify` passed
- [ ] OpenAPI contract updated (if API changed)
- [ ] Migration reviewed (if DB changed)
- [ ] Observability impact reviewed (logs/metrics/traces)

## Manual Approval Required?
- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (high-risk paths changed)

## Rollback Plan
- Describe rollback steps for this change.
